    "deep_analysis": "EL's financial deterioration is severe and accelerating. Revenue declined 6.9% CAGR over 4 years ($17.7B in 2022 to $14.3B in 2025), a loss of $3.4B or 19% of the business.     "key_thesis": "Estée Lauder is a value trap, not a value opportunity.
